reason: Current canon does not permit upgrading observed 16-account evidence, posture readiness, or unit tests into 20-account proof, scale completion, pilot readiness, production readiness, or desktop admission.

forbidden_claims.allowed_only_after: approved live validation contour with machine-carried evidence, runtime attestation, rotation participation, rollback readiness, and owner acceptance
explicit scale-gate closeout with repo-scope machine proof
separate release/pilot gate with required evidence and owner approval
never; 16-account evidence is observed-only and cannot be upgraded by wording
never; posture compatibility is not proof

allowed_narrow_claims.limits: not runtime truth, not stable 16, not stable 20, not pilot ready
not stage proof, not scale proof, not mutation
